title: Suntem fan-tas-tici!
summary: A satirical commentary on Romanian President Nicușor Dan's attendance at Donald Trump's first Board of Peace meeting, where Trump called Romanians 'fantastic' while mistakenly referring to Dan as prime minister. The article mocks various Romanian political factions' reactions to the event, from sovereignists claiming the gaffe was intentional, to enthusiastic supporters celebrating improved US-Romania relations, to critics concerned about Romania distancing itself from European allies.
talking_points: Trump called Nicușor Dan 'fantastic' but mistakenly referred to him as prime minister, sparking varied reactions across Romania's political spectrum
Romanian sovereignists and TikTok supporters of Călin Georgescu interpreted Trump's gaffe as intentional recognition of Georgescu as the 'real' leader
Some commentators celebrated Dan's Washington trip as neutralizing the threat from Simion, Georgescu, and Șoșoacă, while others noted Romania's marginalized seating position
Critics raised concerns about Romania distancing itself from France, UK, and Germany while aligning with the US, and questioned Romania offering justice expertise for Palestine
The article satirizes the universal self-congratulation across all Romanian political camps following the Washington visit
author: Cristian Preda
